column2: Verify Remote Pilot Experience Acceptance for Initial PFA Qualification
column3: ['Ensure a caa/maa liaison is present. ', 'Verify that the remote pilot has equivalent remote pilot experience accrued outside of the competence framework. ', "Submit the remote pilot's personal logbook to demonstrate their experience. ", "Confirm that the CAA accepts the remote pilot's experience for initial PFA qualification. "]
column4: ['The presence of the caa/maa liaison can be confirmed through communication or documentation. ', 'This information should be provided in the personal logbook submitted by the remote pilot, and it must meet the criteria specified in the context document. ', 'The submission process may involve uploading or physically delivering the logbook to the CAA. ', 'This can be confirmed through communication with the CAA, or by checking their records if available. ']
